description: Fix falsy checks on numeric parameters (min_price, min_beds, min_baths, min_sqft) that skip filters when the value is 0.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/zillow && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace falsy checks with undefined checks for numeric filter parameters
userStories.description: Multiple search tools use `if (params.min_price || params.max_price)` which skips the filter when min_price is 0 because 0 is falsy. Use `!== undefined` checks instead.
acceptanceCriteria: All numeric filter parameters use `!== undefined` checks instead of truthiness checks
A min_price of 0 correctly applies the price filter
A min_beds of 0 correctly applies the beds filter
